---
title: "About me"
image: "data/imgs/profile_2023.png"
toc: false
about:
  id: summary
  template: solana
  links:
  - text: Twitter
    url: "https://twitter.com/tomicapretto"
    icon: twitter
  - text: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/tomicapretto"
    icon: github
  - text: LinkedIn
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/tom%C3%A1s-capretto-a89873106/"
    icon: linkedin
  - text: Email
    url: "mailto:tomicapretto@gmail.com"
    icon: envelope
---

:::: {#summary}

Consultant in statistics, data science, and statistical computing.

University professor and educator.

Here I share [blog posts](blog.qmd), [software projects](software/index.qmd), and [teaching material](teaching.qmd).

:::

:::: {#socials}

:::
